description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 디지털 하드웨어의 융합으로, 데이터를 햇빛처럼 처리하는 나무를 형상화.
description.en: A fusion of organic botany and digital hardware, representing a tree that processes data as if it were sunlight.

prompt: A hyper-macro cinematic shot of FLORA-9, titled 'The Synaptic Willow.' A sentient digital tree with weeping branches made of #89CFF0 iridescent fiber-optic cables and #50C878 emerald circuit veins. The leaves are translucent liquid crystal displays flickering with golden data patterns. The tree exhales #FFB6C1 fractal pollen clouds into a deep #4A0E4E velvet void. Floating binary code droplets hang from the branches like crystalline dew. 8k resolution, photorealistic fusion of organic growth and advanced cybernetic technology, ethereal volumetric lighting.
